Description: Audit Logs Report generates successfully with filters
Test Data:
START_DATE: June 1 2026
END_DATE: June 10 2026
STATUS: Success
USERNAME: AdminMaker
ACTION_TYPE: ALL
Validation Reason: Verify audit logs report displays correctly with all filters applied
Test Steps:

5. Set End Date: June 10 2026

9. Click Submit button
10. Verify Results section appears

Results section displays records
Date Time column shows timestamps
Username column shows AdminMaker entries
XLSX export button works successfully
